query: What is the Mass Shooting Tracker (massshootingtracker.site) total number of mass shootings recorded for full-year 2025, and specifically for July 2025? This tracker uses the broad 4+ people shot definition.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary of findings:

## Mass Shooting Tracker (MST) — 2025 & July 2025

**Answers to the question:**
- **Full-year 2025 total: 488 mass shootings** (566 killed, 2,023 wounded)
- **July 2025: 68 mass shootings**

**How I obtained these:** The MST website is a JavaScript single-page app whose data table doesn't appear in static HTML. I traced the site's backend to its Amazon S3 data files:
- `totals.json` → 2025 = {count: 488, killed: 566, wounded: 2023}
- `2025-data.json` → the 488-record incident array, filtered server-side (via a jq proxy) to count July = 68

The July figure was cross-validated: two independent queries agreed, and the full monthly histogram (Jan 30, Feb 21, Mar 32, Apr 26, May 52, Jun 70, **Jul 68**, Aug 46, Sep 38, Oct 38, Nov 32, Dec 35) sums exactly to 488, confirming no truncation.

**Important caveat for the forecasting caller:** MST's 488 is its *own* broad-definition count (4+ shot, may include the shooter) and is **distinct from and higher than**:
- Gun Violence Archive: ~408 for 2025
- Wikipedia's curated list: 425

These should not be conflated. The MST figures are live/continuously-updated crowd-sourced data as of the 2026-07-07 access date, with 2025 being a completed full year.

sources.title: Mass Shooting Tracker – 2025 incident array (backend data)
sources.snippet: 488-element JSON array of 2025 incidents with ISO date fields; July 2025 (2025-07) count = 68 via server-side jq filtering.

sources.title: Mass Shootings in 2025 – Mass Shooting Tracker
sources.snippet: Official 2025 data page (JS single-page app). Compiled by all-volunteer group from r/GunsAreCool.

sources.title: FAQ – Mass Shooting Tracker (definition)
sources.snippet: Defines mass shooting as an incident in which 4 or more people are shot; includes the shooter's death.

sources.title: Mass Shooting Tracker: Definition, Snapshot, and How to Use
sources.snippet: Reported MST 2025 running tally of 320 total incidents as of ~Aug 12, 2025; describes MST methodology (4+ shot, may include shooter).

sources.title: There were 408 mass shootings in 2025, the lowest in 5 years
sources.snippet: Gun Violence Archive data: 408 mass shootings in 2025 (4+ shot excluding shooter), ~360 killed and ~1,840 injured — distinct from MST's count.

sources.title: List of mass shootings in the United States in 2025
sources.snippet: Curated list: 420 killed and ~1,900 wounded in 425 shootings (4+ victims) — distinct definition/count from MST.

key_facts: Mass Shooting Tracker (MST) recorded 488 total mass shootings for full-year 2025 (its own count, from totals.json byYear.2025.count).
MST recorded 68 mass shootings in July 2025 (verified via server-side jq filtering of the 488-record 2025 data array; two independent queries agreed and monthly histogram sums to 488).
MST's 2025 toll: 566 killed and 2,023 wounded (from totals.json).
MST uses the broad definition: 4+ people shot (injured or killed) in a single outburst, and MAY INCLUDE the shooter — producing higher counts than GVA.
MST's 488 is distinct from and higher than Gun Violence Archive (~408 for 2025) and Wikipedia's curated list (425 shootings, 420 killed, ~1,900 wounded).
MST 2025 monthly histogram: Jan 30, Feb 21, Mar 32, Apr 26, May 52, Jun 70, Jul 68, Aug 46, Sep 38, Oct 38, Nov 32, Dec 35 (sum = 488).
MST data is served client-side from Amazon S3 endpoints: totals.json and 2025-data.json; the website itself is a JavaScript single-page app.
A third-party snapshot (gunsafetyfacts.com, ~Aug 12, 2025) noted MST's mid-year 2025 running tally at 320 incidents, consistent with the 488 year-end total.

data_points.metric: Gun Violence Archive mass shootings, 2025 (comparison, different tracker)
Wikipedia curated list mass shootings, 2025 (comparison, different definition)
